content:
type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Ack - my implementation is already complete (crossed messages). Final diff: added binascii import, added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes] just above 'class ImageBlock', and image_to_base64 body is now: 'if not self.image: return self' / 'encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image)' / 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing); self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None' / 'self.image = encoded_image' / 'return self'. So I DID touch the mimetype-guessing line too (changed self.image -> decoded_for_guessing) since normalize_image_bytes needs to run before guessing to handle pre-encoded input correctly. When you merge, please adapt your get_image_mimetype() to accept/use decoded_for_guessing (or call normalize_image_bytes internally) rather than raw self.image, otherwise mimetype guessing will break for pre-encoded base64 images. Happy to hand-resolve the merge together if useful.

content:
type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1, resolved conflict: image_to_base64 now calls normalize_image_bytes() for encoding + self.get_image_mimetype() for mimetype (instead of inlining filetype.guess), and get_image_mimetype() now uses normalize_image_bytes() internally to decode pre-encoded base64 before guessing (fixes a bug where guessing on already-base64 bytes would fail). All 12 tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py pass. Pushed final merge to team/agent1, patch.txt rebuilt from team/main..HEAD.
